description: Worked with students on coding projects and taught programming related cirriculum.
Engage with clients and translate their idea into a digital product, and collaborate in a group to develop prototypes for given projects
Conducted undergraduate research in artificial intelligence to design and propose a project focusing on an issue in artificial intelligence.
Assist with the production of coursework and assements, as well as course layout. Engage with students and motivate them to create productive projects following Agile framework.
Gathered research on various issues for events and policies. Contacted registered voters in the 17th Congressional District and convince them to support Adam Schleifer
Honors Bachelor's of Science in Computer Science. Sole recipient of FIRST Robotics Scholarship in my year.
